title: Botanical Aesthetics
description: Small changes to the look and feel of crops, plants, and other similar textures.
body:
![Screenshot in-game of all changed textures so far. (Leaves have not been changed)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/336408f269468a04476e1038bdd93edf7f2d16a7_0.webp)

This project is done to keep true to more of the "real life" looks of the plants while also giving a significant improvement to the vanilla look so that crops specifically can be seen at a glance and you don't waste any more time harvesting that wheat that looks done, but is actually still one stage away from being harvestable. This was made with ease of harvesting in mind as well as those with colour-blindness.



Asset textures changed so far:
- Wheat
- Potatoes
- Carrots
- Beets
- Allium
- Azure Bluets
- Cornflower
- Lilacs
- Lily pads
- Poppy
- Tulip (all varieties)
- Dandelion
- Lily of the Valley
- Oxeye Daisy
- Rose Bushes
- Peonies
- Spore Blossom
- Brown Mushroom



I hope you enjoy this texture pack!



If installing manually, be sure to add this to your "Roaming\.minecraft\resourcepacks" folder to load correctly.

You do not need to unzip the file to make it work.
